videos.headline: Why Notre Dame's independent status may 'backfire' for CFP hopes this year
videos.description: Matt Simms details why Notre Dame might no longer control its own destiny after falling to Texas A&M.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Analysis (Why Notre Dame's independent status may 'backfire' for CFP hopes this year) 2025/09/14 ESHEET
